summary: Merchant Withdrawal UI and API testing completed successfully. All features working: Quick amount buttons (50, 100, TOUT), custom amount input, destination display (MoMo/Bank), auto-withdraw toggle with settings, and withdrawal history. Backend APIs all passing (10/10 tests). Fixed a bug in GET /api/merchants/balance endpoint that was returning 404 due to empty projection result.

issues: 500 quick amount button not shown when balance is 130 (correct behavior - only shows amounts <= available balance)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Fixed bug in /api/merchants/balance - was returning 404 when merchant had no balance fields (empty projection result)
✅ Quick amount buttons correctly filter based on available balance (50, 100, 500 only show if <= balance)
✅ TOUT button correctly sets amount to full available balance
✅ Destination display shows MoMo network and number from payoutSettings
✅ Auto-withdraw toggle reveals settings panel with frequency, min_amount, and destination options
✅ French labels used throughout: 'Retirer', 'Montant à retirer', 'Vous recevrez', 'Destination du retrait'
✅ All withdrawal APIs properly authenticated with merchant JWT token
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - used existing test merchant
context_for_next_testing_agent: Merchant withdrawal feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/merchants/balance, POST /api/merchants/withdraw, GET /api/merchants/withdrawals, GET/POST /api/merchants/auto-withdraw/settings. Frontend: MerchantWithdrawal.jsx component in Settings > Withdrawal tab. Test merchant has momo_number: 0541234567, available balance: GHS 130.00.

GET /api/merchants/balance.notes: Fixed bug - was returning 404 due to empty projection result

GET /api/merchants/withdrawals.notes: Returns withdrawal history, respects limit parameter

GET /api/merchants/auto-withdraw/setting.notes: Returns default settings if none configured

POST /api/merchants/withdraw.notes: Validates minimum amount (5 GHS) and sufficient balance

features_verified: Balance cards display (Available, Pending, Total Received)
Quick amount buttons (50, 100, 500, TOUT) - only shows amounts <= available balance
Custom amount input with GHS prefix
Destination display showing MoMo network and number
Withdraw button shows amount and is disabled when invalid

bug_fixed.root_cause: The query used a projection that only returned balance fields. If merchant had no balance fields, the result was an empty dict {}, which evaluated to falsy in 'if not merchant:' check
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to first check if merchant exists with a simple id projection, then proceed with balance calculations
